author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Oracle test suite is implemented across 8 crates: ferray-core, ferray-stats, ferray-linalg, ferray-ufunc, ferray-fft, ferray-polynomial, ferray-strings, ferray-ma. Each has tests/oracle.rs that loads JSON fixtures from fixtures/<crate>/ and validates output against NumPy reference values within ULP tolerance. The shared infrastructure lives in ferray-test-oracle crate (run_unary_f64_oracle, run_binary_f64_oracle, run_unary_bool_oracle, run_reduction_f64_oracle helpers). Closing as completed.
